name: Blending Brooch
description:
Activate (Free Action) (concentrate)

Trigger You roll Stealth for initiative and can see a creature

Requirements You're a master in Stealth.

This small, matte-black pin always seems to be on the periphery of your vision, even when you stare directly at it. When you Activate the talisman, choose one creature you can see. You become Invisible to that creature unless it succeeds at a DC 28 Will check save. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until the target hits you with an attack, whichever comes first.
